title: lophiaris johnii
intro: Lophiaris johnii, also known as "Chaparral", is a small shrub native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its high concentration of nordihydroguaiaretic acid (NDGA), a compound that has been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lophiaris johnii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. Lophiaris johnii can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and has been traditionally used by Native American cultures for its medicinal and spiritual properties.
